title: Vertical Alignment
text: Vertical Alignment Vertical alignment of the label— Top (default), Bottom , or Center . Value Representation Description T Top Label is positioned at the top of the rectangle (default). C Center Label is positioned in the middle of the rectangle. B Bottom Label is positioned at the bottom of the rectangle. Applies To Label Related Links Labels in Forms and Reports Labels are objects that contain static. Most labels are associated with a field, but unassociated labels can be used for any static text on the component. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
